creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Rene Ladan from comment #2)

Oh, it was on handbook, sorry.

librsync 1.0.0 is sucessor after eleven years but newer versions are not compatible with the old 0.9.7, maybe because of this we had net/librsync and net/librsync1 (now net/librsync2) on base.

Thank you.
